title: juncus supinus var. nigritellus
intro: Juncus supinus var. nigritellus, also known as the black tussock rush, is a type of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Juncus supinus var. nigritellus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Juncus supinus var. nigritellus is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves or creams for topical application.
